subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1913-03-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Paris is a city of adornment. I hope that, as this century is a radiant century and this age a merciful age
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @harmony of science and religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @literal interpretation, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
